gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Account" button on the left panel
Then the user should see the "Login" button on the right side of the left panel
When the user clicks on the "Login" button
And the user enters the "username" into the enter username field
And the user clicks on the "Next" button
And the user enters the "password" into the password field
Then the user should see the "Login" button on the right side of the panel
And the user should be navigated to the "mlbtest.okata.com" page
And the user should see the username into the "Enter Username" field.
And the user should see the "Password" input text field.
And the user should be redirected to the Okta Authentication flow
And the user should be successfully directed to the SOP Tool Home Page

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Account" button on the left panel
steps.result: *Then* the user should see the "Login" button on the right side of the left panel

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks on the "Login" button

*And* the user enters the "username" into the enter username field

*And* the user clicks on the "Next" button

*And* the user enters the "password" into the password field
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see the "Login" button on the right side of the panel

*And* the user should be navigated to the "[mlbtest.okata.com|http://mlbtest.okata.com]" page

*And* the user should see the username into the "Enter Username" field.

*And* the user should see the "Password" input text field.

*And* the user should be redirected to the Okta Authentication flow

*And* the user should be successfully directed to the SOP Tool Home Page
